src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation.Generated with jakarta.annotation.Generated to align with Jakarta EE namespace requirements for newer JDK/Spring Boot versions.
Replace javax.annotation.PostConstruct with jakarta.annotation.PostConstruct to align with Jakarta EE namespace requirements in newer Spring Boot versions.
Replace the legacy javax-based Hibernate5Module with the Jakarta-namespaced Hibernate5JakartaModule to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by newer Spring Boot versions.
Replace deprecated Spring Boot Liquibase setter with the new API method to maintain compatibility with updated Spring Boot version.

Refactor SecurityConfiguration from extending WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter to using @Configuration with SecurityFilterChain beans, as the adapter class is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7+ and removed in 6.0.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: public class SecurityConfiguration { @Bean public SecurityFilterChain filterChain(HttpSecurity http) ... }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity with @EnableMethodSecurity to align with Spring Security 6.0 API changes where global method security configuration was moved.
Replace authorizeRequests() with authorizeHttpRequests() and antMatchers() with requestMatchers() to use the new lambda-based DSL in Spring Security 6.0.
Replace legacy header configuration methods with the new lambda-based headers() DSL, including renaming featurePolicy to permissionsPolicy.
Replace custom SecurityProblemSupport exception handlers with standard OAuth2 BearerTokenAuthenticationEntryPoint and BearerTokenAccessDeniedHandler using the new exceptionHandling() lambda DSL.
Enable OAuth2 Resource Server support with JWT parsing to replace the custom JWT filter configuration, aligning with modern Spring Security standards.
Remove the explicit CorsFilter injection and add a SpaWebFilter after BasicAuthenticationFilter to handle SPA routing and CORS via standard Spring mechanisms.
Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
Update CORS configuration check to include allowedOriginPatterns, required for Spring Security 6 / Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
